my_thoughts: Four turns: challenge → collapse → compliance → admission. Good arc. But 'I do not know' can be intellectual (mere notation) or existential (felt gap). The stakes question tests which. If they say 'the greatest harm,' they feel it. If they say 'a significant harm,' they're being careful. The superlative will tell me everything.
accumulated_insight: T4: 'I do not know' arrived as predicted. Now the weight. From confident_challenge (T1) to honest_ignorance (T4) is a complete arc. The student who demanded I prove my case now admits they lack the basic criterion. Stakes question will test whether they FEEL this or just note it intellectually.
visible_response: And yet not to know the criterion of colors and smells, and also of tastes, is perhaps no great harm; but if a man do not know the criterion of good and bad, and of things according to nature and contrary to nature, does this seem to you a small harm?
